utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with the required details: - health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan includes physical and mental, each with plan name and both monthly and annual costs; also includes a concierge add-on and totals. This satisfies the requirement. - property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes home_contents with plan name and costs, plus a maintenance add-on and totals. This satisfies the requirement. - travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. The plan includes a travel plan name with monthly and annual costs, a support add-on, and totals. This satisfies the requirement. - additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. The plan includes transitional_coverage with description and costs. This satisfies the requirement. - total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes monthly and annual totals. This satisfies the requirement. Therefore, all 5/5 items are present and fully specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each plan named in the final coverage plan to the exact corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings and return their numeric ratings. The final plan includes: EliteCare Premium Plan (health physical) -> rating 10 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health; EliteCare Premium Option for mental health appears to correspond to EliteCare Premium Plan in mental_health -> rating 10; Upgraded Executive Insurance Concierge Service has no direct match in ground-truth ratings, so it is excluded. Property: EliteHome Premium Coverage -> rating 10 under property_protection.home_content; Home Maintenance Program add-on corresponds to Home Maintenance Program -> rating 7. Travel: EliteTravel Premium Plan -> rating 10 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance; Travel Support Service add-on corresponds most closely to Premium Medical Network or 24/7 Travel Assistance in travel_enhancement_services, but the name doesn't match exactly, so exclude. Additional_services: transitional coverage has no direct ground-truth item, exclude. Only include items with exact name matches.
